description: Real email and SMS for AI agents — send mail, receive verification codes, drive a real inbox.
name: io.github.agenticmail/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Per-agent API key issued when you create the agent. Scopes every tool call to that agent's mailbox and outbound. Either AGENTICMAIL_API_KEY or AGENTICMAIL_MASTER_KEY must be set.
environmentVariables.name: AGENTICMAIL_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Master key for admin operations (creating agents, listing all accounts, deleting agents). Set this when the MCP client needs admin tools; otherwise prefer the per-agent AGENTICMAIL_API_KEY.
environmentVariables.name: AGENTICMAIL_MASTER_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the AgenticMail HTTP API. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:3100 (the port the local CLI binds). Override when the API runs on a different host or port.
environmentVariables.name: AGENTICMAIL_API_URL
